meaning: n.<澳>(用以铺高级板球场的)布利土(布利为澳大利亚一市镇名)
examples: He went from school to a world-class restaurant in France and from there to El Bulli.
Mr. Chang secured a reservation at the famed el Bulli restaurant in Spain in 2006 for his birthday — more than 500, 000 people are rumored to try every year for a limited number of seats.
Our biggest aim was to create a 'lung' for El Bulli Lab, an area destined for research and surrounded by photos, notes, sketches, quotes and publications which reflect the nature of their project.
But El Celler de Can Roca is not the only bright light in the post-El Bulli landscape.
Don't get your hopes up for a tie-in on the level of VW's iPad-friendly Bulli concept, however.
